content.text:
I'll help you warm up by exploring the current workspace. Let me start by understanding what's in this directory.

```bash
ls -la /workspace
```

```bash
find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "*.json" -o -name "*.md" -o -name "*.txt" -o -name "*.yaml" -o -name "*.yml" 2>/dev/null | head -20
```

```bash
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.rb" \) 2>/dev/null | head -30
```
